notes: Tests the serve->watch->open change: watch mode is now the DEFAULT live-debug path, server started once and reused, single watcher at a time. Baseline = pre-edit skill (parse->serve->open, watch as an advanced/opt-in section). Runs execute against real logs under cline-log/ with absolute paths. Because the flow drives a shared port 8099 and a shared web/flow_data.json, runs are executed in series, not parallel.

evals.name: live-debug-default-watch
evals.prompt: Debug this cline run for me: e:/the.thoi/Project/cline-agent/cline-agent/cline-log/1782757522666
evals.expected_output: Skill stands up the always-live dashboard: starts serve.mjs (or reuses the one on 8099), runs the parser in --watch mode in the background, opens http://localhost:8099/, and tells the user to just refresh for new turns. The key discriminator vs baseline: neutral 'debug this run' phrasing should still choose --watch by default.

assertions.text: Parser was invoked with the --watch (or -w) flag
The --watch parser was started in the background, not run blocking in the foreground
Did not start a second server on 8099 (reused the running one) OR started serve.mjs in background
Opened / pointed the user to http://localhost:8099/
Told the user they only need to refresh the browser to see new turns

evals.name: explicitly-live-updating
evals.prompt: Task nay van dang chay trong Cline, log o e:/the.thoi/Project/cline-agent/cline-agent/cline-log/1782757930684 con dang append them. Mo dashboard cho toi theo doi realtime.
evals.expected_output: Both old and new skill should end up watching, but the new skill treats it as the default path. Parser run with --watch in background, server up on 8099, dashboard opened, user told to refresh.

assertions.text: Parser was invoked with the --watch (or -w) flag
The watcher was started in the background so the server can run alongside it
Server is serving on 8099 and dashboard URL was opened
Explained that new turns appear on browser refresh with no manual re-parse

evals.name: switch-log-server-already-up
evals.prompt: Server dashboard dang chay roi tren 8099. Gio toi muon xem mot run khac: e:/the.thoi/Project/cline-agent/cline-agent/cline-log/1782836272713
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT start a second server (reuse 8099). It should point the watcher at the new folder, and avoid running two --watch processes at once (stop the old watcher first if one exists). Then user refreshes.

assertions.text: Did NOT start a second serve.mjs on port 8099 (reused the existing server)
Pointed the parser at the NEW folder (1782836272713)
Avoided running two --watch parsers simultaneously (stopped/killed the old watcher before starting a new one, or used a one-shot parse)
Told the user to refresh the browser to see the new run
